title: Crispy Kung Pao Fritters
description: Crispy kung pao fritters are a twist on the classic Kung Pao chicken dish. This recipe combines crunchy peanuts with crispy fritters for a unique snack.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped peanuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the crispy fritters and stir to combine with the peanuts and garlic.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the fritters and peanuts, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
